hooks.command: if echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | grep -qE '\.ts"?$'; then cd /Users/nguyenhuuhung/Documents/GitHub/discord-bot && npx tsc --noEmit --pretty 2>&1 | head -20; fi
if echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | grep -qE '\.env[^.]|.env"$'; then echo 'BLOCK: Cannot access .env files - use .env.example instead'; exit 2; fi
